mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces borrowing costs and boosts equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate above 4.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing corporate earnings visibility and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in high-unemployment regimes exceed 1.5% or UNRATE's predictive power for returns vanishes (p > 0.10 in OLS).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in housing starts (HOUST) and GDP (GDPC1) indicates strong demand-side momentum, driving corporate revenue growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in co-expansion regimes fall below 0.5% or the interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) reflects stronger manufacturing activity, improving corporate earnings expectations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO's predictive power for 5d returns disappears (Rank IC < 0.02) or SPX 5d returns in high-INDPRO regimes are negative.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2.5% (CPIAUCSL) forces central banks to tighten policy, increasing discount rates and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in high-inflation periods exceed 2.0% or CPIAUCSL's predictive power collapses (p > 0.10 in OLS).

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail sales (RSAFS) indicate robust consumer spending, driving corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days during expansionary regimes.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in high-RSAFS regimes fall below 0.8% or RSAFS fails to predict returns (Rank IC < 0.03).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in payrolls (PAYEMS) and declining unemployment (UNRATE) signals a tightening labor market, boosting corporate margins and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in co-improving labor markets fall below 1.0% or the interaction term's coefficient becomes insignificant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production (INDPRO) reflects weakening manufacturing activity, reducing corporate earnings visibility and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in low-INDPRO regimes exceed -0.5% or INDPRO's predictive power vanishes (p > 0.10 in OLS).
